accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and contextual facts are accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims; details align with the resolution.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the request to authorize displays for the 250th anniversary celebration.

changes_to_existing_law.why: This is a non-binding request resolution that does not amend or repeal existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the unique, one-time nature and the limited time period of the arrangements.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the Dec 31, 2025–Jan 5, 2026 period and the Dec 2, 2025 approval date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures both the display request and the transmittal directive to the Clerk.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, descriptive language with no advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent despite a minor typo ('toauthorize').

concise.why: Compact and free of padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Secretary of the Interior, Clerk of the House, and the Semiquincentennial Commission Chair.

correct_figures.why: Five nights, the date range, and approval date are all accurate.
